mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_id = #{eventId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, e.name AS event_name, e.location AS event_location, e.event_date FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN event e ON f.event_id = e.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_id = #{eventId}
